title: Smart Study Assistant
description: Summarize pasted notes or textbook text, surface key points, and generate practice quiz questions with an LLM-backed Streamlit UI.

title: Smart Q&A Bot for Your Notes
description: Upload or paste notes, embed them locally (Hugging Face), index vectors in Chroma, and ask grounded questions with LangChain RAG—Groq powers the chat model.

title: AI Email Reply Generator
description: Paste an email, pick a tone (Formal, Friendly, Short), and get a Groq-powered draft reply—Express API plus vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no frontend build.

title: Resume & Cover Letter Improver
description: Upload or paste a resume, add a job description, and get AI-powered feedback—strengths, improvements, STAR rewrites, ATS keywords—plus a tailored cover letter you can download.

title: Website RAG Chatbot
description: Enter any public URL, scrape its content automatically, and chat with it using Retrieval-Augmented Generation—local embeddings, Chroma vector store, and Groq for answers.

title: AI Product Description Generator
description: Beginner-friendly Streamlit app that turns structured product inputs into descriptions, taglines, social blurbs, and benefit-led bullets using Python, Streamlit, and the Groq API.
